texto: The art and culture that is New York, communications, finance, all these things help make up New York. The rest of the country should be happy that we are what we are.
explicacao: Orientação direta de David Dinkins sobre temas ligados a felicidade. A afirmação “The art and culture that is New York, communications, finance, all these things help make up New …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a felicidade, art, happy, útil em momentos de happy e culture.

texto: Some of us claim that New York City is the capital of the country, indeed the capital of the world. Now, that may be a bit much for those who don't come from New York, but clearly we are an important city for reasons of our cultural advantages.[David Dinkins ex NYC Mayor]
explicacao: Citação de David Dinkins sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Some of us claim that New York City is the capital of the country, indeed the capital of the worl…” articula reflexao, new-york-city, capital em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.

texto: Well, I'm not sure, but of one thing I am certain: History judges one differently than contemporary observers, and so I think that as time passes, I hope that not me personally so much, but our administration will be seen for some of the things that we accomplished.
